---
title: "Now"
pagetitle: "Now — Mahshad Sarikhani"
subtitle: "What I'm spending time on"
toc: true
toc-location: right
toc-depth: 2
---
*Updated May 2026. This is a [now page](https://nownownow.com/about): a periodic record of where attention is actually going, not where it should be going.*

---

## Research *work*

::: {.now-item}
**Agentic Lémann pipeline** — early architecture and IRB planning. The core design question right now is how to make the extraction steps auditable without making them unusable. Balancing traceability against clinical workflow friction.
:::

::: {.now-item}
**ESGAR 2026 presentations** — two first-author orals accepted. Building slides for both. The motility paper and the Bayesian risk stratification model.
:::

::: {.now-item}
**Motility manuscript** — final checks before submission. Based on the ECCO and ESGAR abstracts, with Motilent and the UCL group. I'm excited about it.
:::

## Reading *now*

::: {.now-item}
- *BABEL* — R.F. Kuang
- *Statistical Rethinking* — Richard McElreath
- *The Fixer* — Bernard Malamud
- *The Sacred and the Profane* — Mircea Eliade
:::

## On *the side*

::: {.now-item}
**UK Global Talent Visa** — RCR route, Exceptional Promise. Application in progress. The evidence portfolio is assembled; now it is a waiting game.
:::
